name: Sanken Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Sanken Electric Co., Ltd. manufactures, purchases, and sells electric equipment and apparatus. The company operates through two segments, Semiconductor Devices Business and Power System Business. Its Semiconductor Devices Business segment manufactures and sells power modules, power ICs, control ICs, hall-effect ICs, bipolar transistors, MOSFET, IGBT, thyristors, rectifier diodes, and light emitting diodes (LEDs). This segment serves the automobiles, home appliances, industrial machinery, audio visual and office automation equipment, telecommunications equipment, and LED lighting sectors. The company's Power System Business segment manufactures and sells uninterruptible power supplies, inverters, DC power supplies, airway beacon systems, switching mode power supply units and transformers. It also undertakes electronic, telecommunication, and other construction works. The company has operations in Japan, China, Korea, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Toho Sanken Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sanken Electric Co., Ltd. in June 1962. Sanken Electric Co., Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Niiza, Japan.
